step.title: Load context
step.action: If market-research, domain-research, or tech-research exist, load them as additional context.

step.title: Identify gaps and ambiguities
step.action: Analyze the product brief for gaps, ambiguities, and unstated assumptions.
Identify areas where requirements are vague or contradictory.

step.title: Structured questioning
step.action: Conduct structured elicitation with the user using techniques: scenario-based questioning, boundary analysis, assumption challenging.
step.ask: Walk through each identified gap with targeted questions.

step.title: Document findings
step.action: Organize findings into stakeholder needs, assumptions, constraints, and dependencies.

step.title: Produce report
step.template-output: Apply the template from template.md, filling all sections with elicitation findings.
